title: ilex ovata
intro: Ilex ovata, also known as the narrow-leaved holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex ovata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Ilex ovata can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
